examples: Carruthers had been gored by a rhinoceros.
Contrary to its name, the black rhinoceros is actually grey in color.
When the good burghers of Amsterdam were first presented with a rhinoceros, spectators shook their heads in disbelief.
They were hunting one of the world's most endangered mammals, the greater Asian one-horned rhinoceros.
His favourite animal is the rhinoceros, and rhetorically he charges ahead in much the same way.
